booking_request: Sure! I can help you book a vehicle. Could you share the pickup and drop locations?
Let me arrange a lorry for you. Please provide your load details and preferred time.
Booking request received! Which type of vehicle do you need — mini truck, tempo, or full lorry?
We'll get a truck ready for you. Please confirm the date, time, and pickup location.
Great! Let's get your booking started. How much load are you looking to transport?
price_inquiry: Our rates depend on distance, vehicle type, and load weight. Could you share the route details?
I can get you a price estimate. Please share the pickup city, drop city, and load type.
Prices start from ₹500 for local transport. For intercity, I'll need the route to give an exact quote.
Let me calculate a rate for you. What's the distance and type of goods you're moving?
vehicle_availability: Let me check vehicle availability in your area. Which city are you looking in?
We have multiple trucks available. Could you confirm the vehicle size you need?
Checking our fleet now. What date and time do you need the vehicle?
We usually have good availability. Please share your location so I can check right away.
delivery_status: Let me track your shipment. Could you share your order ID or booking number?
I'll check the delivery status right away. Please provide your order ID.
Your shipment is being tracked. Can you share the booking reference number?
Let me look up your delivery details. Please provide the tracking ID or order number.
complaint: I'm really sorry to hear about your experience. Let me escalate this to our team immediately.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. I'm registering your complaint right now.
That's unacceptable and I'm sorry. Your complaint has been noted and our team will contact you within 24 hours.
I understand your frustration. Let me connect you with our grievance team for a quick resolution.
payment_issue: I'm sorry about the payment issue. Let me check your transaction status right away.
Payment issues are handled on priority. Could you share the transaction ID or screenshot?
I'll escalate this to our payment team. Refunds typically process within 3-5 business days.
Let me look into this. Can you confirm the payment method and approximate amount?
support_request: I'm here to help! Could you describe your issue in a bit more detail?
Let me connect you with our support team. Please hold on for a moment.
I understand you need assistance. Our support agent will be with you shortly.
Sure, I'll escalate your query. In the meantime, can you share your registered phone number?
cancellation_request: I can help you cancel your booking. Could you share the order ID?
Cancellation request received. Please confirm the booking number you'd like to cancel.
Let me process the cancellation for you. Note: cancellation charges may apply if the vehicle is already dispatched.
Sure, I'll cancel that for you. Any specific reason? Your feedback helps us improve.
greeting: Hello! Welcome to EasyWay Logistics. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Good to see you. What can I do for you?
Hey! Welcome back. Need help with booking, tracking, or something else?
Namaste! How can I assist you today?
goodbye: Goodbye! Have a great day. Feel free to reach out anytime.
Thanks for using EasyWay Logistics. See you soon!
Bye! Hope we could help. Don't hesitate to come back if you need anything.
Take care! We're always here if you need us.
thanks: You're welcome! Happy to help. Is there anything else you need?
Glad I could assist! Feel free to ask if you have more questions.
No problem at all! Anything else I can do for you?
You're most welcome! We're always here to help.
